programmes.show_description: Loving Arms: Classic '70s police series. Regan must find a source of illegal guns that are flooding the market before further lives are lost.
Go East on Sunset Until You Reach the Gates of Hell: American sitcom. Alan drowns his sorrows with Charlie after failing to provide his son with a fun-filled weekend.
If I Can't Write My Chocolate Song I'm Going To Take a Nap: American sitcom. Charlie quickly realises that he cannot cope by himself when his long-term cleaning lady quits her job.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Shopping from home.
TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
The Holy Thief: Another adventure for the medieval sleuthing monk. Brother Cadfael probes a double abduction when a slave girl and the bones of the Abbey's Saint Winifred go missing.
Action from the day's games in the Football League including Coventry City v Southampton, Middlesbrough v Bristol City, and Millwall v Blackburn Rovers in the Championship.
Brian Moore presents action-packed football highlights from November 1977 featuring Queens Park Rangers v Manchester United, Everton v Coventry City, and Sunderland v Luton Town.
Football highlights from December 1977 as Sunderland take a trip down south to play Charlton Athletic, Ipswich Town face Aston Villa, and Derby County host Manchester City.
Sharpe's Rifles: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. After saving the life of Sir Arthur Wellesley, Sergeant Richard Sharpe is rewarded with a mission to locate a missing agent.
Sharpe's Eagle: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Wellesley orders Sharpe to ensure that an arranged mission involving an incompetent colonel's new regiment is a success.
Sharpe's Company: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Spain 1812 - Wellesley, who is now the Duke of Wellington, sets his sights on Badajoz as Sharpe is reunited with Teresa.
Wartime drama film sequel starring Harrison Ford and Robert Shaw, 1978. A team of misfit military experts are tasked with destroying a bridge that is vital to a German scheme.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Wartime drama film sequel starring Harrison Ford and Robert Shaw, 1978. A team of misfit military experts are tasked with destroying a bridge that is vital to a German scheme.
Astonishing action-packed thriller film starring Uma Thurman and David Carradine, 2003. A woman emerges from a four-year coma and seeks payback against those who put her into it.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Astonishing action-packed thriller film starring Uma Thurman and David Carradine, 2003. A woman emerges from a four-year coma and seeks payback against those who put her into it.
IV: Swashbuckling action-adventure drama. The Walrus crew take on a mission that ends in disaster, Silver warns Flint about Billy, and a figure from Vane's past pays him a visit.
Reality series following an ambitious team of classic car hunters. Tension grows among the squad as they try to fill their trailer with pre-war vehicles from railway ghost towns.
The Car Lot Baggers: Drama series about a loveable rogue. When an unscrupulous builder wants a piece of land occupied by a friend of Arthur, he hires thugs to put the frighteners on.
Shopping from home.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Shopping from home.
Brian Moore presents a special FA Cup Fourth Round edition from January 1978 as West Ham United face QPR, Bristol Rovers challenge Southampton, and Middlesbrough take on Everton.
An edition from February 1978 with Fulham taking on Tottenham Hotspur, Blackpool and Blackburn Rovers battling in a seven-goal thriller, and Nottingham Forest hosting Wolves.
The Hotel Dick: Classic US action drama series. When he takes a job as a hotel detective, Thomas's bids to catch a cat burglar are complicated by his relationship with a hooker.
A Summer Madness: Classic US detective drama. Theo investigates the bombing of a restaurant while unaware that one of his fellow detectives has a vested interest in the case.
Burning Ambition: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken finds himself being interrogated about a crime he did not commit thanks to a jilted lover and a lying husband.
On the Run: Classic crime drama. A convicted armed robber escapes from jail and goes gunning for Regan.
The Prizefighter: Classic detective series. Dempsey and Makepeace find themselves in grave danger when an injured bare-knuckle boxer sparks off an investigation into counterfeiters.
Going Home: Classic US action drama series. Thomas returns home to Virginia to attend his grandfather's funeral but gets caught up in the search for a valuable family heirloom.
Law Dance: Classic US detective drama. A convicted murderer exploits a legal loophole to get a second trial and may walk free when the key witness in the case is then killed.
Bully Boys: Classic drama. Ken and Harry are shocked when they delve into the affairs of a local landlord, and Laura and Rocky teach a schoolteacher who is also a bully a lesson.
Messenger of the Gods: Classic 1970s police series. Regan and Carter believe Lukey Rix to be a suspect when a consignment of mercury is stolen, but Lukey has an alibi.
Get Daley: Drama series about a rogue. Arthur is not even safe in hospital when he witnesses the death of a business associate and a friend of Terry's is in the frame for it.
Sharpe's Rifles: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. After saving the life of Sir Arthur Wellesley, Sergeant Richard Sharpe is rewarded with a mission to locate a missing agent.
Action-adventure film sequel starring Jason Statham and Curtis '50 Cent' Jackson, 2023. The team of elite mercenaries reunites - with new blood - to tackle an arms dealer in Libya.
